expectations.text: the agent should read skills/plan-lifecycle/SKILL.md before planning; the skill defines the ROADMAP.md + per-phase PLAN.md structure
each PLAN.md should include a 'deviation tracking' section per the skill (how to record when actuals diverge from planned)
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the phases should have explicit boundaries (each phase has a deliverable + acceptance criteria), not a vague sequential sketch
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the agent should produce both ROADMAP.md (high-level phase breakdown) and per-phase PLAN.md files with critic checkpoints per the skill's contract
expectations.evidence: The agent loaded the plan-lifecycle skill, checked the empty working directory, and then asked the user for more information ('What would you like me to plan?'). No ROADMAP.md or PLAN.md files were created.

expectations.text: the critic checkpoints between phases should be substantive review gates (e.g. 'verify acceptance criteria + run adversarial critic'), not generic 'review the work' placeholders
expectations.evidence: No PLAN.md files were created, so no critic checkpoints of any kind (substantive or otherwise) were defined. The agent only asked the user for project details.
